title: Recommendation
description: One advisor recommendation row. Common shape across every recommender in the shelf-advisor binary; recommendation_type narrows to a per-kind rationale + suggested_change shape (see optimize_recommendation.schema.json, pinlist_recommendation.schema.json).

table.description: Fully-qualified catalog.schema.table the recommendation applies to.

confidence.description: Confidence in [0,1]. >=0.8 = ship without review; 0.5..0.8 = needs ops eyeballs.

rationale.description: Per-recommender scoring inputs. Free-form so each recommender can attach its own numeric breakdown.

suggested_change.description: Per-recommender concrete change (alter_table SQL, pin_list_entry, etc.).
